title: In the matter of NY (A Child)

metadata.title: In the matter of NY (A Child)
metadata.summary: Principle issue: Whether the inherent jurisdiction can be used to order the summary re-relocation of a child where there is a statutory scheme and where the substantive and procedural characteristics of that scheme are avoided.
extracts: THE COURT ORDERED that no one shall publish or reveal the name or address of the child who is the subject of these proceedings or publish or reveal any information which would be likely to lead to the identification of the child or of any member of her family in connection with these proceedings.

(1) Reunite International (2) The International Centre for Family Law, Policy & Practice (3) International Academy of Family Lawyers LORD WILSON: (with whom Lord Hodge, Lady Black, Lord Kitchin and Lord Sales agree)
